debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
A : Set U
B : Set V
a : U
b : V
f : U → V
h1 : one_one_on f A
h2 : image f A = B
h3 : a ∈ A
h4 : f a = b
⊢ ↑(A \ {a}) ∼ ↑(B \ {b})

failed_attempts:
by
  refine' ⟨Equiv.ofBijective _ ⟨_, _⟩⟩
  · intro x
    simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Ne, not_false_iff] at *
    have hx : x.1 ∈ A := x.2.1
    have hfx : f x.1 ∈ B := by rw [h2]; exact ⟨x.1, hx, rfl⟩
    have hne : f x.1 ≠ b := by
      intro h
      apply x.2.2
      apply h1.eq_of_on_eq hx h3
      simp_all
    exact ⟨⟨f x.1, hfx, hne⟩, rfl⟩
  · intro x y h
    simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq] at *
    apply h1.eq_of_on_eq x.1.2.1 y.1.2.1
    simp_all
  · intro z
    simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Ne, not_false_iff] at *
    have hz : z.1 ∈ B := z.2.1
    rw [h2] at hz
    obtain ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩ := hz
    have hx' : x ∈ A := hx
    by_cases hxa : x = a
    · subst hxa
      exfalso
      simp_all
    · refine' ⟨⟨x, hx', hxa⟩, _⟩
      simp_all

by
  apply equiv_of_one_one_onto
  · intro x hx
    simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx
    have h5 : f x ∈ B := by rw [h2]; exact ⟨x, hx.1, rfl⟩
    simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    constructor
    · exact h5
    · intro h6
      apply hx.2
      apply h1 hx.1 h3
      rw [h6, h4]
  · intro y hy
    simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
    rw [h2] at hy
    cases' hy with x hx
    cases' hx with hxA hfx
    use x
    simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    constructor
    · exact hxA
    · intro h7
      apply hy.2
      rw [← hfx, h7, h4]
  · intro x1 x2 hx1 hx2 h
    apply h1
    · simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx1; exact hx1.1
    · simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx2; exact hx2.1
    · exact h

    constructor

    · intro h
      apply Subtype.ext
      simp_all

    simp only [Set.mem_diff] at hy

    · intro h
      apply Subtype.ext

by
  apply equiv.of_bijective
  let g : ↥(A \ {a}) → ↥(B \ {b}) := fun x => ⟨f x.val, by
    simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Ne, not_not] at x.property
    have : f x.val ∈ B := by rw [h2]; exact ⟨x.val, x.property.1, rfl⟩
    simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Ne, not_not]
    constructor
    · exact this
    · intro h
      apply x.property.2
      apply h1 x.val a x.property.1 h3
      simp_all⟩
  constructor
  · intro x y h
    apply Subtype.eq
    apply h1 x.val y.val x.property.1 y.property.1
    simp_all
  · intro y
    have : y.val ∈ B := y.property.1
    rw [h2] at this
    cases' this with x hx
    have : x ∈ A := hx.1
    have : f x = y.val := hx.2
    by_cases hxa : x = a
    · subst hxa
      simp_all
    · use ⟨x, hxa⟩
      simp_all

  refine' ⟨Equiv.ofBijective _ _⟩
  · intro x
    simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Ne, not_false_iff] at *
    have hx : x.1 ∈ A := x.2.1
    have hfx : f x.1 ∈ B := by rw [← h2]; exact ⟨x.1, hx, rfl⟩
    have hne : f x.1 ≠ b := by
      intro hf

    · intro x y hxy
      simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq] at *

      exact h1 x.2.1 y.2.1 this
    · intro y
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Ne, not_false_iff] at *
      have hy : y.1 ∈ B := y.2.1
      rw [← h2] at hy
      obtain ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩ := hy
      have hne : x ≠ a := by
        intro hxa
        rw [hxa] at hx
        simp_all
      refine' ⟨⟨x, by simp_all [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]⟩, rfl⟩

by
  apply Equinumerous.mk
  · intro x
    have hx : x.val ∈ A \ {a} := x.property
    have hxA : x.val ∈ A := Set.mem_of_mem_diff hx
    have hxf : f x.val ∈ B := by rw [← h2]; exact ⟨x.val, hxA, rfl⟩
    have hxf_ne : f x.val ≠ b := by
      intro h
      have : x.val = a := h1 (by simp [h3]) hxA (by simp [h4, h])
      exact Set.not_mem_of_mem_diff hx this
    exact ⟨f x.val, Set.mem_of_mem_of_subset (by simp [hxf]) (Set.diff_subset _ _)⟩
  · intro y
    have hy : y.val ∈ B \ {b} := y.property
    have hyB : y.val ∈ B := Set.mem_of_mem_diff hy
    rw [← h2] at hyB
    obtain ⟨x, xA, rfl⟩ := hyB
    have x_ne_a : x ≠ a := by
      intro h
      simp_all
    exact ⟨⟨x, Set.mem_diff_of_mem xA x_ne_a⟩, rfl⟩
  · intro x
    simp [Function.comp]
    have hx : x.val ∈ A \ {a} := x.property
    have hxA : x.val ∈ A := Set.mem_of_mem_diff hx
    have hxf : f x.val ∈ B := by rw [← h2]; exact ⟨x.val, hxA, rfl⟩
    have hxf_ne : f x.val ≠ b := by
      intro h
      have : x.val = a := h1 (by simp [h3]) hxA (by simp [h4, h])
      exact Set.not_mem_of_mem_diff hx this
    simp [hxf_ne]
  · intro y
    simp [Function.comp]
    have hy : y.val ∈ B \ {b} := y.property
    have hyB : y.val ∈ B := Set.mem_of_mem_diff hy
    rw [← h2] at hyB
    obtain ⟨x, xA, rfl⟩ := hyB
    have x_ne_a : x ≠ a := by
      intro h
      simp_all
    have h1' : one_one_on f A := h1
    have h2' : image f A = B := h2
    have h3' : a ∈ A := h3
    have h4' : f a = b := h4
    simp [Set.ext_iff] at *
    have : f x ∈ B \ {b} := ⟨hyB, hy.2⟩
    simp_all

    rw [← h2] at hy1
    obtain ⟨x, xA, rfl⟩ := hy1
    use x, xA
    intro xa
    rw [xa] at hy2
    exact hy2), by
    simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Ne, Prod.exists, exists_prop] at *
    obtain ⟨hy1, hy2⟩ := y.2
    rw [← h2] at hy1
    obtain ⟨x, xA, rfl⟩ := hy1
    intro xa
    rw [xa] at hy2
    exact hy2⟩
  constructor <;> ext <;> simp [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, Ne]
  <;> aesop
